message:
fix(tests): fix label test isolation and ID parsing for new output format

Fix test issues related to label testing and output format changes.

e2e_errors.rs:
- Create new issue for invalid label tests instead of reusing existing
  issue with --clear-labels. This avoids potential state contamination
  when testing label validation failures.

e2e_undefer.rs:
- Update ID extraction to handle new output format "✓ Created bd-1: ..."
  where the ID is the 3rd word instead of 2nd word. The checkmark emoji
  was added as a success indicator.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
